title: Banana's and Katanas
description: A unique take on adding banana's to Minecraft.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2af904d72c060d604b42d3010e7210fd3ce01cb8.png)
![Devider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c29255922330a9e06e5466b2fa408a0c264060bf.png)
![Items & Recipes Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e28eb073833874316b4fffc0855fa7525c99ca54_0.webp)


## Banana's
- Can be eaten to restore 4 hunger points.
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba1d8f22d2b65385eae1ea982ed447aa78f53eea.png)


## Banana Katana
- Deals 8 damage points.
- Has an 8 second cooldown.
- Gives Jump Boost 3 when right clicked.
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e148ea6c91a962afd41d7a184e486754e076f87a.png)


## Banana Pie
- Can be eaten to restore 8 hunger points.
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/898312e85c21734b3c13b6cb64a4d0e494c5b2ef.gif)


## Banana Bread
- Can be eaten to restore 5 hunger points.
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5dd71001208cc79ba1602152d3fad7dcf97201e7.png)
![Devider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c29255922330a9e06e5466b2fa408a0c264060bf.png)
